parameters.query: SELECT 1 AS found FROM workflow_steps WHERE step_key = '{{ $json.step_key }}' AND status = 'DONE' LIMIT 1;
SELECT id FROM projects WHERE project_number = '{{ $('📋 Extract Data').item.json.project_number }}' LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO events (event_type, payload, source_system, source_flow)
VALUES (
  'ROOM_MEASUREMENTS_UPDATED',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'project_id', '{{ $json.project_id }}',
    'project_number', '{{ $json.project_number }}',
    'room_count', {{ $json.room_count }},
    'source_file', '{{ $json.source_file }}',
    'source_event_id', '{{ $json.event_id }}'
  ),
  'n8n',
  'M4_10_MagicPlan_Parser'
)
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO workflow_steps (step_key, step_type, status, completed_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('📊 Aggregate Results').item.json.step_key }}',
  'M4_10_MAGICPLAN_PARSER',
  'DONE',
  now()
)
ON CONFLICT (step_key) DO UPDATE SET
  status = 'DONE',
  completed_at = now();
SELECT 1 AS found FROM workflow_steps WHERE step_key = '{{ $json.step_key }}' AND status = 'DONE' LIMIT 1;
